globalOptions.name: -s
globalOptions.description: Display only a total for each argument

globalOptions.name: -a
globalOptions.description: Write counts for all files, not just directories

globalOptions.name: -d
globalOptions.description: Max depth of directories to report

globalOptions.name: --max-depth
globalOptions.description: Print total for directory N levels deep

globalOptions.name: -x
globalOptions.description: Skip directories on different file systems
